description: Horizontal ICE 'Wall of Honor' memorial tribute card, in the same template as ICE's other fallen-agent graphics. The background is a soft-focus dark teal and blue texture. At upper left, white serif typography reads 'Wall of Honor' (with 'of' in italic script) beside the gold-and-blue ICE special agent badge emblem wrapped in a blue mourning ribbon. Centered is a framed older portrait photograph of a dark-haired, mustached man in a dark suit, white shirt and dark tie, standing in front of foliage and flowers. To the left of the portrait, white text reads 'Special Agent / Juan Gilberto Reyes Orellana', a gold divider, 'End of Watch' (italic 'of'), another divider, then the date 'Thursday, January 29, 1998'. The right third shows a draped American flag above a bouquet of deep red roses. The tweet states he died in 1998 after a vehicle collision during pursuit of suspects.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Special Agent Juan Gilberto Reyes Orellana; End of Watch; Thursday, January 29, 1998
